title: What Apple's CEO shake-up suggests about its upcoming earnings
summary: Apple (AAPL) CEO Tim Cook is stepping down and will be replaced by John Ternus. Visible Alpha head of TMT research Melissa Otto and B. Riley Wealth chief market strategist Art Hogan break down what the CEO shake-up could indicate about the company's upcoming earnings results.

title: Meta to track employee keystrokes to train AI, D.R. Horton earnings
summary: Yahoo Finance Anchor Josh Lipton tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute, including Reuters reporting that Meta Platforms (META) will track employee keystrokes as part of AI training and D.R. Horton (DHI) stock popping after topping second quarter earnings estimates. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.

title: Apple vs. Microsoft: Which is better positioned based on leadership?
summary: Apple (AAPL) CEO Tim Cook announced that he will be stepping down effective September 1, transitioning from chief executive to executive chairman. Between Apple and Microsoft (MSFT) — which continues to be led by chairman and CEO Satya Nadella — which tech stock is currently better positioned? Visible Alpha head of TMT research Melissa Otto, B. Riley Wealth chief market strategist Art Hogan, and Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma compare and contrast the two companies amid the latest AI trends.

title: What a New Apple CEO Will Mean for You and Your Devices
summary: Apple’s  chief-executive-to-be,  John Ternus,  is a hardware guy.  On Monday, the company said Ternus will take over the top spot from  Tim Cook  in September.  You might use services from Google,  Meta Amazon  com,  Netflix  and  Microsoft  but there’s a good chance you access them on an Apple phone, laptop or tablet—or all three.

title: Tim Cook to step down as Apple CEO, with John Ternus tapped as successor
summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook will step down in August and become executive chairman of Apple's board.

title: Tesla Q1 earnings preview: Robotaxi rollout, mega capex spending in focus
summary: Tesla will report first quarter earnings after the bell on Wednesday, with Wall Street focused on the company's slow-to-evolve Robotaxi rollout and capital expenditures, which are expected to balloon due to the company's AI ventures.

title: What To Look for in Tesla's Earnings Deck, Beyond the Numbers
summary: Tesla’s “shareholder deck,” as the company calls it, is always a must-read for investors.  This quarter, investors should be on the lookout for updates about several items, including Tesla’s AI ambitions.  AI-trained robo-taxis are Tesla’s first big AI application.

title: Why Tesla Stock Is at a Crossroads
summary: Tesla stock is in an interesting spot. It is down 10% since the company reported better-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings on Jan. 28. However, that leaves shares trading for roughly 200 times earnings expected over the next 12 months.

title: Mark Mobius, Emerging Markets Investing Pioneer, Dies at 89
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Lea en españolMark Mobius, who put emerging markets on investors’ radar with on-the-ground insights over more than four peripatetic decades, has died. He was 89.He died today, according to a post on his LinkedIn page attributed to his spokeswoman, Kylie Wong. John Ninia, a partner at Mobius Investments, said he died in Singapore.In more than 30 years with Franklin Templeton Investments, officially Franklin Resources Inc., Mobius became an evangelist for money-making opportunities
